sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
The black F moved right and is now overlapping the yellow F. But the level didn't complete. The action stopped early after 10 moves (noop_short_circuit). Let me check the current state and see if the black F is now overlapping the yellow F.
Looking at the images, I can see the black F is now on top of the yellow F. The charcoal F is still on the left. The level hasn't completed.
Let me check the segmentation to understand the current state better. Maybe I need to overlap all three F shapes, or maybe the goal is different.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state of F shapes
nodes = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
for n in nodes:
    if n['pixels'] > 10:
        b = n['boundary']
        minr = min(p[0] for p in b)
        maxr = max(p[0] for p in b)
        minc = min(p[1] for p in b)
        maxc = max(p[1] for p in b)
        print(f"color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} hash={n['hash']} id={n['id']} bbox=[{minr},{minc}]-[{maxr},{maxc}]")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Now I see:
- Charcoal F (c): bbox=[45,0]-[53,8] - 45 pixels
- Yellow F (Y): bbox=[45,51]-[53,53] - only 27 pixels (was 45 before, so partially covered)
- Black F (B): bbox=[45,54]-[53,62] - 40 pixels
The black F is now overlapping the yellow F (yellow has shrunk from 45 to 27 pixels). But the level didn't complete.
Maybe the goal is to overlap all three F shapes? I need to bring the charcoal F to overlap with the others too. But the charcoal F is at cols 0-8, far from the others.
Wait, maybe I need to move the charcoal F instead? Or maybe the goal is to perfectly overlap all three?
Let me think about this differently. The three F shapes are at:
- Charcoal: cols 0-8
- Yellow: cols 51-53 (partially visible)
- Black: cols 54-62
The black F is on top of the yellow F. Maybe I need to move the charcoal F to overlap them too? But I don't know which key controls the charcoal F.
Actually, wait. Let me reconsider. Maybe the game is about matching F shapes - I need to move the black F to exactly overlap the yellow F (same position). Or maybe I need to overlap all three.
Let me try pressing SPACE now that the black F overlaps the yellow F.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Black F now overlaps yellow F. Try SPACE to confirm.
action(['SPACE'])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
